basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Associate Professor/Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 60 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) has published the Associate Professor/Professor Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 60 Associate Professor and Professor positions. Candidates holding a Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in an appropriate branch, along with a very good academic record, are eligible to apply online through the official IIT ISM Dhanbad website. The application process will be active from the notification release date to 30-09-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF a

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in an appropriate branch, with a very good academic record throughout. Good CPI/CGPA/Percentage in Ph.D course work where applicable.
qualification.details: Associate Professor: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent (in terms of grades, etc.) at the preceding degree in appropriate branch, with a very good academic record throughout. Candidate should have good CPI/CGPA/Percentage in Ph.D course work where ever applicable. A minimum 6 years of teaching / research / industrial experience of which minimum 3 years should be at the level of Assistant Professor (pay level 12) in IITs / IISc Bangalore /IIMs /IISERs or in the institutes of national importance or Indian/ Foreign Institutes of equivalent standards/ Senior Scientist in the reputed National/International research organizations/ Industries at the time of application. The candidate should have demonstrated adequate experience of independent research in terms of guidance of Ph.D. students, publications in reputed journals and conferences, patents, laboratory/course development and/or other recognized relevant professional activities. Professor: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent (in terms of grades, etc.) at the preceding degree in appropriate branch, with a very good academic record throughout. Candidate should have good CPI/CGPA/Percentage in Ph.D course work where ever applicable. A minimum 10 years of teaching/research/industrial experience of which minimum 4 years should be at the level of Associate Professor in IITs / IISc Bangalore / IIMs / IISERs or in the institutes of national importance or Indian / Foreign Institutes of equivalent standards / Senior Scientist in reputed National / International Research Organizations / Industries at the time of application. The candidate should have demonstrated leadership in research in a specific area of specialization in terms of guidance of Ph.D. students, strong record of publications in reputed journals and conferences, patents, laboratory / course development and/or other recognized relevant professional activities.

salary_details.details: Associate Professor: Pay Level 13A2 (Min Basic Pay ₹ 1,39,600/-) Professor: Pay Level 14A (Min Basic Pay ₹ 1,59,100/-)

selection_process: Screening based on qualifications and experience Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Associate Professor/Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-09-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT ISM Dhanbad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT ISM Dhanbad Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT ISM Dhanbad Associate Professor/Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad Associate Professor/Professor Vacancy Details 2026
IIT ISM Dhanbad Associate Professor/Professor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Associate Professor: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent (in terms of grades, etc.) at the preceding degree in appropriate branch, with a very good academic record throughout. Candidate should have good CPI/CGPA/Percentage in Ph.D course work where ever applicable. A minimum 6 years of teaching / research / industrial experience of which minimum 3 years should be at the level of Assistant Professor (pay level 12) in IITs / IISc Bangalore /IIMs /IISERs or in the institutes of national importance or Indian/ Foreign Institutes of equivalent standards/ Senior Scientist in the reputed National/International research organizations/ Industries at the time of application. The candidate should have demonstrated adequate experience of independent research in terms of guidance of Ph.D. students, publications in reputed journals and conferences, patents, laboratory/course development and/or other recognized relevant professional activities. Professor: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent (in terms of grades, etc.) at the preceding degree in appropriate branch, with a very good academic record throughout. Candidate should have good CPI/CGPA/Percentage in Ph.D course work where ever applicable. A minimum 10 years of teaching/research/industrial experience of which minimum 4 years should be at the level of Associate Professor in IITs / IISc Bangalore / IIMs / IISERs or in the institutes of national importance or Indian / Foreign Institutes of equivalent standards / Senior Scientist in reputed National / International Research Organizations / Industries at the time of application. The candidate should have demonstrated leadership in research in a specific area of specialization in terms of guidance of Ph.D. students, strong record of publications in reputed journals and conferences, patents, laboratory / course development and/or other recognized relevant professional activities.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad Associate Professor/Professor Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Screening based on qualifications and experience Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Associate Professor/Professor Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-09-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT ISM Dhanbad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad Associate Professor/Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Associate Professor/Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Associate Professor/Professor positions at IIT ISM Dhanbad is 30th September 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. with first-class or equivalent at the preceding degree in an appropriate branch, along with a very good academic record throughout. Good CPI/CGPA/Percentage in Ph.D. coursework is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Associate Professor/Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 60 vacancies announced for the Associate Professor/Professor positions at the Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: For Associate Professor, the salary is Pay Level 13A2 with a minimum basic pay of ₹ 1,39,600/-. For Professor, it is Pay Level 14A with a minimum basic pay of ₹ 1,59,100/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for IIT ISM Dhanbad recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Associate Professor/Professor positions at IIT ISM Dhanbad is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the institute's official website.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening based on the qualifications and experience of the candidates, followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT ISM Dhanbad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand, with the pincode 826004.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Associate Professor/Professor posts at IIT ISM Dhanbad is 411002/1/2026-Dean(F)/2.

faq.question: Q10. Who can I contact for any clarifications regarding the application?
faq.answer: For any clarifications, you can contact the recruitment team at [email protected] or call them at 0326-223-5204/5268 during office hours.
